arts.ttl: Sunderland ‘have been in talks’ to sign Italy U19 international – Black Cats ‘want to seal the deal’
arts.sum: Sunderland have their eyes set on Fiorentina youngster Eddy Kouadio, according to Africa Foot. The 18-year-old has been climbing through the ranks of the Italian club’s youth system but hasn’t yet made an appearance for their first team. Kouadio has still managed to catch the attention of Sunderland, who are interested to sign him.
